question_text: What is the definition of speed?

options.label: A
options.text: The distance travelled in a certain direction

options.label: B
options.text: The distance travelled per unit of time

options.label: C
options.text: The change in direction of an object

options.label: D
options.text: The force acting on an object

explanation: Speed measures how far something travels in a given amount of time, like kilometres per hour. It doesn't include direction—that would be velocity.
